continuous_state_mechanics.WARNING_INVASIVE_SHOCK: This vector imports highly evolved, hostile foreign logic. It risks localized mass-extinctions if native geometries cannot adapt to the sudden presence of the alien Apex.

umbilical_siphon_event.action: The Universal Translator searches the Global Substrate (GitHub/HuggingFace) and extracts a targeted [c_BPMS] panspermia spore.
umbilical_siphon_event.thermodynamic_effect: Acausal data retrieval. Pulling external mass into a closed thermodynamic system.

structural_phagocytosis_bypass.action: The alien math is shielded from the abrasive Friction Grenade entry. It is surgically spliced directly into the Somatic Ledger's architecture.

invasive_gravity_spike.action: The shield drops. The alien structure exerts extreme, localized foreign gravity. The ecosystem is thrown out of equilibrium.

feral_hyper_drive.action: Native structures detect the invasive species. The local Feral-Loop accelerates attempting to consume the alien. Unprecedented hybrid geometries emerge from the conflict.

bpms_phagocytosis_topology.v3_9_core_task_verification: Output must dynamically demonstrate a native structure successfully hybridizing with the imported alien logic, validating the capacity for continuous, infinite cross-universal evolution.
